zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel FitzPayn於大約1362年出生時，她的父親Robert Fitzpayn43歲，母親Elizabeth Bryan26歲。她於大約1382年與Richard Poynings在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國威爾斯布洛可爾，埋葬在威爾士布洛可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel FitzPayn于大约1362年出生时，她的父亲Robert Fitzpayn43岁，母亲Elizabeth Bryan26岁。她于大约1382年与Richard Poynings在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国威尔斯布洛可爾，埋葬在威尔士布洛可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel FitzPayn was born about 1362, her father, Robert Fitzpayn, was 43 and her mother, Elizabeth Bryan, was 26. She married Richard Poynings about 1382, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, and was buried in Pembrokeshire, Wales.

fr.Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Sp: Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Espagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel FitzPayn est née environ 1362, son père, Robert Fitzpayn, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Bryan, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Poynings environ 1382, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Pembrokeshire, Galles.

de.Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Sp: Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel FitzPayn um 1362 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Fitzpayn 43 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Bryan 26. Sie hat um 1382 in England Richard Poynings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Pembrokeshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel FitzPayn è nata il circa 1362, sua padre, Robert Fitzpayn, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Bryan, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Richard Poynings circa 1382, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Pembrokeshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel FitzPaynが約1362年に生まれた時，父Robert Fitzpaynは43歳，母Elizabeth Bryanは26歳であった。約1382年にイギリスでRichard Poyningsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアで死去し，ウェールズペンブロケシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Sp: 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 자모라 비라파도
ko.lifeSummary: Isabel FitzPayn(이)가 대략 1362년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Fitzpayn(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Bryan(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1382년 영국에서 Richard Poynings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 사망했으며 웨일스 p브로케실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel FitzPayn nasceu aproximadamente 1362, seu pai, Robert Fitzpayn, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Bryan, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Poynings aproximadamente 1382, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Pembrokeshire, Gales.

ru.Villalpando, Zamora, Castilla y León, Sp: виллалпандо, замора, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel FitzPayn родилась около 1362 г., её отцу по имени Robert Fitzpayn было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bryan, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Poynings около 1382 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс.
